# Failures: 0

## CONVERSATION
Concierge: Hi Octavia! Welcome to Shiftsmart. Ready to get started? Your next step is to complete your orientation in the app — reply here if you have any questions!
Partner: Done

## CONCIERGE OUTPUT
You're all set — you can start picking up shifts now! Open the Shifts tab to see what's available.
